name: MathBox
when_to_use: 需要可旋转的三维曲面、向量场、坐标系或线性变换动画时用它而非手写,因为原生 Three.js 在数学坐标轴、采样管线、相机控制和演示级画质上会失败；非做二维函数图。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能拼出粗糙 Three.js 场景,无法稳定处理数学坐标范围、采样器、标签、相机与连续变换；MathBox 把这些封装为声明式 WebGL 图元树。

data_in.note: 裁剪为 MathBox 原生 cartesian → axis → interval → line 管线；curve.expression 在 boot 中编成 interval.expr 所需回调,只允许 AI 生成的可信表达式。

curve?.expression: string —— 以 x 为变量、可用 Math.* 的可信 JavaScript 表达式,映射为 [x,f(x),0]
curve?.color?: integer —— Three.js 十六进制颜色数值,默认 0x3090ff

spec.note: WebGL canvas 容器必须显式给 480px 高度(铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高)；MathBox peer 依赖 three >=0.118.0(dev ^0.139.2);本 boot 的 OrbitControls 钉 0.148.0(在 peer 范围内,API 兼容)。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need rotatable 3D surfaces, vector fields, coordinate systems, or linear-transformation animations instead of building them by hand, because native Three.js tends to fail at mathematical axes, sampling pipelines, camera controls, and presentation-quality rendering. It is not for 2D function plots.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to a rough Three.js scene and cannot reliably coordinate mathematical ranges, samplers, labels, cameras, and continuous transformations. MathBox packages them as a declarative WebGL primitive tree.

data_in.note: Trimmed to the native MathBox cartesian -> axis -> interval -> line pipeline. boot compiles curve.expression into the callback required by interval.expr; allow only trusted expressions generated by AI.

curve?.expression: string -- trusted JavaScript expression in x, with Math.* available; maps to [x,f(x),0]
curve?.color?: integer -- Three.js hexadecimal color number; default 0x3090ff

spec.note: The WebGL canvas container must have an explicit height of 480px (rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights). MathBox has peer dependency three >=0.118.0 (dev ^0.139.2); this boot pins OrbitControls to 0.148.0, within the peer range and API-compatible.

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):固定 mathbox@2.3.2-rc1 + OrbitControls 0.148.0，并合并 MathBox/Threestrap 两个 Bootstrap 的插件表；容器明确 480px 高度。

example._why: MathBox 图元链深且 channels/emit/range 容易拼错,最小例固定为三维坐标中的 sinc 曲线。

peer.note: MathBox 是 Three.js 上层；此 boot 采用其 ESM 实际依赖的 0.148.0 OrbitControls,不要混入另一份 Three 实例。

carriers.widget: conditional:需 WebGL + ESM；canvas/overlay 与 CSS 均落 shadow,但 GPU/上下文配额须宿主探针确认
carriers.codex: conditional:需 sandbox iframe 开放 WebGL；无 worker/wasm/uplink

isolation.evidence: mathbox +esm grep `document.head`: 0 — CSS must be included manually (README) and the boot loads build/mathbox.css itself; WebGL canvas + HTML overlay are rendered into the passed `element` (mathBox({element})), so no head/body injection. globalEvents=yes: +esm contains a `resize` handler (threestrap resize plugin → window resize) and the boot's OrbitControls (three) attaches transient pointer listeners on the canvas ownerDocument during drag; neither explicitly destroyed by the boot. shadowCompatible=conditional: canvas+overlay+CSS can live in shadow (widget boot does this) but require a live WebGL context/GPU quota and leave a global window-resize listener.
